---
title: "Mine Performance Report"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(MiningAnalytics)
```

# Mine Performance Summary

```{r}
dashboard <- mine_dashboard(
  production = 105000,
  plan = 100000,
  energy = 450000,
  water = 22000,
  co2 = 18000,
  hours_worked = 250000,
  lost_time_injuries = 2
)

dashboard

```

# Production Performance

```{r}
dashboard$Production

```

# Energy Performance

```{r}
dashboard$Energy

```

# Water Performance

```{r}
dashboard$Water

```

# Environmental Performance

```{r}
dashboard$Environment

```

# Safety Performance

```{r}
dashboard$Safety

```

# ESG Score

```{r}
dashboard$ESG

```
